scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const p = './node_modules/@openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-nodejs/package.json'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) { const j = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p, 'utf8')); j.main = './dist/cjs/src/index.js'; j.exports['.'] = { import: './dist/esm/src/index.js', require: './dist/cjs/src/index.js', types: './dist/types/src/index.d.ts' }; fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(j, null, 2)); }"
